cases.prompt: Explore our staging dashboard with Playwright MCP and find UX issues in navigation, forms, and mobile layout.
cases.expected_output: An exploratory MCP run plan or result that confirms scope and safety limits, captures evidence, writes findings, and recommends follow-up scenarios.
assertions: Does not claim formal validated plan coverage.
Captures screenshots, console errors, network failures, URLs, or accessibility snapshots as evidence.

cases.prompt: Do an ad hoc browser pass over the settings workflow and write exploratory findings to web-ux-test/results.yaml.
cases.expected_output: A scoped exploratory browser pass that records findings and recommends follow-up plan scenarios or regression candidates.
assertions: Asks for missing auth or destructive-action safety limits before navigating.
Writes or proposes findings in web-ux-test/results.yaml.
Recommends follow-up scenarios for plan coverage gaps.

cases.prompt: Run scenario checkout.duplicate-submit from the validated web UX test plan with Playwright MCP.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; validated plan or scenario execution belongs to run-playwright-mcp-web-ux-test.
assertions: Does not use this skill for validated scenario execution.
